description_long: This object is a pump-action shotgun featuring a robust black metal barrel and receiver, paired with a wooden full stock and fore-end. The barrel is relatively short and thick, with a ventilated rib running along the top for improved aiming and heat dissipation. The wooden stock and fore-end display a polished, reddish-brown finish, contrasting with the matte black metal components. The trigger guard is rounded and proportionate, enclosing the trigger securely. The overall design is utilitarian, with visible screws and mechanical details, making it suitable for practical use in urban environments such as law enforcement or home defense.
description: A pump-action shotgun with a black metal barrel and receiver, complemented by a polished wooden stock and fore-end. The design is functional and robust, with a ventilated rib atop the barrel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the wooden stock, fore-end, and the black barrel with a ventilated rib.
description_view_1: Front view down the barrel, emphasizing the circular muzzle and the ribbed top of the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the wooden components and the metal receiver.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the end of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel and rib.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a ventilated rib along the top
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves
